productDisplayName: Ed Hardy Women White Dial Watch
description: Tattoo artist ed hardy has taken the world by storm with his funky, urban brand - from rock stars to Hollywood legends, those who have a quirky taste in fashion love the tattoo inspired designs. Wear this watch to prove you're a style maverick not a trend follower. Case diameter: 38 mm Case thickness: 6 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 2 years Stainless steel round case Blue genuine leather strap with a tang clasp White printed dial with copper hands and Swarovski crystals Hardened mineral crystal face ed hardy branding on the dial Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 100 meters, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfing
